Hydrological Map

The hydrological basemap highlights water-related features such as rivers, lakes, and drainage networks.

Characteristics

  • Emphasis on water systems
  • River networks and basins
  • Simplified terrain context

Best Use Cases

  • Water system analysis
  • Basin studies
  • Flood risk assessment

Limitations

  • Limited general-purpose use
  • Less detail for urban areas

Suggested Images

  • River basin map
  • Watershed network
